title: Adaptive designs in oncology Phase II trials
text: Bayesian adaptive trials can reduce sample size while maintaining error control when response rates vary across biomarker subgroups.

title: Heterogeneous treatment effects in heart failure
text: Patient baseline risk and ejection fraction modify treatment benefit; causal forests help estimate subgroup effects from observational hospital data.

title: Pediatric trial feasibility
text: Enrollment in pediatric studies is often slower; geographic concentration of sites affects timelines and generalizability of results.

title: Federated monitoring of clinical sites
text: Distribution shift in lab values across sites can invalidate risk models; drift metrics trigger model review before deployment updates.

title: Retrieval augmented clinical assistants
text: Grounding answers in cited abstracts improves trust; latency budgets matter for bedside workflows.
